description:
An Electron app for uploading diabetes device data to Tidepool's backend

Tidepool Uploader is a universal uploader app that allows you to retrieve data from supported devices, including every brand of insulin pump and continuous glucose monitor (CGM) on the US market and a wide variety of blood glucose meters and diabetes apps.
What's Changed
- Scan release candidate with VirusTotal (UPLOAD-1655) by @gniezen in https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/pull/1745
- Update dependencies, including sundial (UPLOAD-1622, UPLOAD-1620, UPLOAD-1621, UPLOAD-1618) by @gniezen in https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/pull/1740
- roll back sinon-chai to a version compatible with our chai by @gniezen in https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/pull/1747
- Add support for Keto-Mojo meter (UPLOAD-1523) by @gniezen in https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/pull/1727
Full Changelog: https://github.com/tidepool-org/uploader/compare/v2.65.1...v2.66.0
